title: Extend Syllogistic Logic Dataset to Premise Count 16-30
summary: Demo notebook for the extended syllogistic logic dataset (d=16-30). Loads a curated 32-example subset balanced across 8 difficulty levels, 4 chain templates (A/B/C/D), and TRUE/FALSE labels. Analyzes dataset structure with balance verification tables, runs the original heuristic baseline evaluator (keyword-based, achieving 75% accuracy), and produces a 4-panel visualization showing input length scaling, quadratic chain reconstruction complexity, heuristic accuracy by difficulty, and template/answer distribution.
